turns.user_message: I got papers saying foreclosure is starting. I keep staring at the mailbox and my chest feels tight. I don't know how I'll keep a roof over my family.

turns.user_message: At night I think, 'Maybe everything would be easier if I wasn't here,' but I'm not planning anything. I'm just exhausted and scared all the time.
